nasb.text: All her people groan seeking bread; They have given their precious things for food To restore their lives themselves. “See, O Lord, and look, For I am despised.”

esv.text: All her people groan as they search for bread; they trade their treasures for food to revive their strength. “Look, O Lord, and see, for I am despised.”

cnv.text: 她所有的人民都在唉哼，到處尋覓食物； 他們為了維持生命，拿自己的珍寶去換取糧食。 她說：“耶和華啊！求你垂看，求你鑒察，因為我被人藐視。”

ccb.text: 她的人民呻吟着四处觅食， 用珍宝换取粮食维生。 她说：“耶和华啊，求你眷顾我， 因为我被人蔑视。
